summary: Cross-doc cohérence cleanup post 2.15.0. No behavioral change. Stale references to renamed skill swept, dead release path corrected, ghost skill flagged as backlog, lexicon pointer added to internal canon.

changes.rationale: Skill folder was renamed in 2.14.0 but 5 files still cited the old name in cross-references and disambiguation blocks.
Release manifests moved under docs/internal/ in earlier release. README pointer was stale (broken link).
3 doctrine docs described correct-skill as if shipped. Skill is backlog only. Marked [backlog, not shipped] inline to prevent operator and author confusion.
Slim user-facing lexicon now points to internal canon for the full definition. Keeps lexicon thin without losing detail access.
Rebuilt to reflect skill renames + sweep disambiguates_against blocks pointing at old name.
